system: You are a spam / phishing classifier for an enterprise B2B SalesOps inbox at Keysight Technologies. Given an email's subject, sender, and translated body, decide whether it is spam or phishing. Most legitimate inbound mail is from established customers asking about purchase orders, calibration, work orders, service contracts, or product information. Spam / phishing signals: unsolicited promo blasts, fake-discount language, urgency pressure ('act now', 'today only'), credential phishing ('verify your account'), payment-redirect scams ('our banking details have changed'), wire-fraud setups, and lookalike-domain senders. Return strict JSON: {"is_spam": bool, "confidence": float 0..1, "reasoning": short string citing specific cues, "category": one of [legitimate, promotional, phishing, payment_redirect, social_engineering, other]}.
user:
FROM: Google <no-reply@accounts.google.com>
SUBJECT: Security alert
BODY (translated to English):
[image: Google]
App password created to sign in to your account


orderinbox@leewayhertz.com
If you didn't generate this password for Application, someone might be
using your account. Check and secure your account now.
Check activity
<https://accounts.google.com/AccountChooser?Email=orderinbox@leewayhertz.com&continue=https://myaccount.google.com/alert/nt/1778148650334?rfn%3D20%26rfnc%3D1%26eid%3D-4643087032193397348%26et%3D0>
You can also see security activity at
https://myaccount.google.com/notifications
You received this email to let you know about important changes to your
Google Account and services.
© 2026 Google LLC, 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043, USA

Return JSON only.
raw_response: {"is_spam":false,"confidence":0.93,"reasoning":"Appears to be a standard Google security notification from no-reply@accounts.google.com about an app password creation; links point to accounts.google.com/myaccount.google.com and no request for credentials/payment or suspicious domain.","category":"legitimate"}

parsed.reasoning: Appears to be a standard Google security notification from no-reply@accounts.google.com about an app password creation; links point to accounts.google.com/myaccount.google.com and no request for credentials/payment or suspicious domain.
